category_sources: Official GitHub README presents fastp as a FASTQ preprocessing and quality-control tool.
source_facts.description says fastp is an ultra-fast all-in-one FASTQ preprocessor.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository is named OpenGene/fastp.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface for fastp.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/OpenGene/fastp, so repo is intentionally not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README documents quality-control and preprocessing usage.
